page_metadata.biotools__summary: FreeClimber is a Python-based, background-subtracting particle detection algorithm that performs a local linear regression to quantify the vertical velocity of points moving in a common direction.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FreeClimber is a Python-based, background-subtracting particle detection algorithm that performs a local linear regression to quantify the vertical velocity of points moving in a common direction.
